title: NOT IN with an AND containing an OR gives wrong result
poc: CREATE TABLE t (i  INT, s VARCHAR(32));
SELECT i FROM t WHERE t.i NOT IN (-450 , 29) AND (t."s" <> 'xyz' OR t."s" IS NULL );
key_bug_features: NOT IN with AND and OR condition evaluation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (i INT, s VARCHAR(32), d DATE);
CREATE TABLE t2 (j INT PRIMARY KEY, k VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL);
SELECT i FROM t1 WHERE t1.i NOT IN (SELECT j FROM t2 WHERE k LIKE 'a%') AND (t1.s <> 'xyz' OR t1.s IS NULL);
